crawled_name:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety (CA)
acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety (CA) and is never sold to 3rd parties and Flock does not have access to any information in the system without Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety's permission.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason, with audits conducted every 30 days.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
hotlists_alerted_on:
National and statewide hotlist sources.

California SVS, NCMEC Amber Alert
overview:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety (CA) uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety (CA) utilizes search to solve crimes. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public. Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety does not share information with out-of-state agencies or federal agencies.

POLICIES
disclaimer:
Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety's Transparency Portal does not include cameras owned by other law enforcement agencies, such as SonCATT, CHP, or other state organizations.

Information is removed from the system after 30 Days in accordance with the city's retention policy.
